raw_consumer_statement: Over the period I had an account with Citibank, I had a Mastercard. On several occasions I had to close the card and request a new card number because of erroneous charges by an unknown entity or entities. As this problem persisted and unbeknownst to me, I learned from Citibank themselves they keep the requested closed card number attached to the new card number allowing the old card number to be used on the new account. I was told this was to assist with making sure utility bills paid off the card are not skipped. The allowed the fraudulent charges to continue. When I disputed these charges and sent Citibank a list of the charges disputed, Citibank did nothing to remove the charges. Through several calls made it appeared through conversations with Citibank it appeared no one viewed the email although during my last call my email was FOUND. Citibank has now turned my card over to a collections company, impacting my credit. I don't mind paying what I owe... but I should not have to pay for fraudulent charges.
